demos.name: EDI Wallet
demos.subtitle: European Digital Identity Wallet
demos.description: Experience a prototype European digital identity wallet with credential management, QR scanning, and selective disclosure flows.

demos.name: DPP System
demos.subtitle: Digital Product Passport Platform
demos.description: Explore a full Digital Product Passport system tracking Brazilian hardwood furniture from sustainable forest harvest through manufacturing, with UNTP verifiable credentials, ESPR compliance data, and supply chain traceability.

demos.name: AI Tax → UBI
demos.subtitle: Universal Basic Income Simulator
demos.description: Interactive simulation showing how Universal Basic Income could be funded through taxation on AI-driven automation, with real-time policy controls and animated money flow visualization.

demos.name: Battery Passport Checker
demos.subtitle: EU Battery Regulation Compliance
demos.description: Interactive questionnaire to determine if you need a Digital Battery Passport under EU Regulation 2023/1542. Covers all supply chain roles, battery types, and provides a downloadable PDF compliance report.

demos.name: CPR DPP Tracker
demos.subtitle: Construction Products Regulation Compliance
demos.description: Interactive tracker for all 37 CPR product families showing harmonised standard progress, EAD pipelines, and estimated Digital Product Passport obligation dates under Regulation (EU) 2024/3110.

demos.name: Triangle Playground
demos.subtitle: Interactive Physics Sandbox
demos.description: Physics sandbox and constellation-building game. Herd triangles, form bonds, and create emergent patterns across three game modes — playfully understanding how innovation systems work.

demos.name: Innovation Platform
demos.subtitle: Government Innovation Management
demos.description: Navigate complex innovation projects with an 8-phase toolkit. Portfolio management, project canvases, and structured reporting for government innovation teams.
